top_signals.title: Strategy CEO says company isn’t going anywhere as bitcoin buyer, sees debt concerns only below $10,000 BTC
top_signals.summary: Strategy would begin considering risks associated with its debt only if bitcoin falls to around $8,000-$10,000, CEO Phong Le said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: J.B. Hunt’s shares up 9% on Q2 earnings beat
top_signals.summary:
J.B. Hunt Transport Services blew past analysts’ second-quarter forecasts on Wednesday, sending shares up 9% in after-hours trading.

The post J.B. Hunt’s shares up 9% on Q2 earnings beat appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Pentagon to offer testosterone treatment to make US troops strong
top_signals.summary: Defence secretary Pete Hegseth’s move comes amid focus on low sperm count and virility on American right

top_signals.title: Codelco pushes Maricunga lithium project start to 2034
top_signals.summary: Chairman Bernardo Fontaine stated the project is now eight years away, delaying the previous 2030 production target.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
